rulings.Case Title: JAMESTOWN SA LLC; ET AL VS. JONATHAN DISHOTSKY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 28, 2023 line 1. DEFENDANT SDP PLUMBING, INC. DBA MR. ROOTER PLUMBING DEMURRER to 3RD Amended COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges facts to support its theory of liability under negligence per se; facts supporting each element of fraud cause of action are stated; affirmative (and incomplete) representation is alleged. Plaintiff's request for judicial notice is DENIED. =(501/HLJ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: RIDGEGATE APARTMENTS, INC. ET AL VS. AMERICAN WEST PARKING SERVICES, INC., ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 28, 2023 line 2. PLAINTIFF CARLAND, INC., H.K. NEW HAWAII LIMITED, KVA CORP. No later than July 21, 2023 moving party to file a supplemental brief (not to exceed 3 pages) addressing the applicability of CCP 664.6 to a defendant who did not appear in the action. rulings.Case Title: FELISSA CAGAN, TRUSTEE OF HIRSCH FAMILY TRUST VS. NEW CINGULAR WIRELESS PCS, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Against Defendant New Cingular Wireless Pcs, Llc

PLAINTIFF FELISSA CAGAN, TRUSTEE OF HIRSCH FAMILY TRUST MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Against Defendant New Cingular Wireless Pcs, Llc is DENIED. rulings.Case Title: FELISSA CAGAN, TRUSTEE OF HIRSCH FAMILY TRUST VS. NEW CINGULAR WIRELESS PCS, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 28, 2023 line 3. DEFENDANT NEW CINGULAR WIRELESS PCS, LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden and opposing party failed to create a triable issue of fact with competent admissible evidence. The Court agrees with the Plaintiff that the contract is unambiguous, and no parol evidence is considered for the contract interpretation. =(501/HLJ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: CENTRAL TOWERS JOINT VENTURE LLC VS. FIDEL HERNANDEZ MARIANO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 28, 2023 line 6. DEFENDANT PAULA COOT MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. No code-compliant Proof of Service on file. Messenger declaration does not comply with CCP 2015.5. Furthermore, Defendant failed to shift its burden and show that the Notice demands more rent than was due. While Defendant's evidence shows that payments have been made in March and April 2023, there is no evidence that payment were tendered and accepted as payments for March and April 2023.=(501/HLJ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.
